issue_body_preview:
<!--- Provide a general summary of your changes in the Title above -->

Generating the multilabel & OD dashboards from notebooks would result in an uncaught error statement:

Input X contains NaN. Traceback (most recent call last): File "c:\workspace\rai\responsible-ai-toolbox\erroranalysis\erro
test_description_zh: 在多标签分类或目标检测场景下，通过 notebook 生成 Error Analysis 仪表板，观察仪表板是否能正常加载并展示数据，检查是否存在因数据中包含 NaN 值导致的错误提示或仪表板无法渲染的情况。
expected_result_zh: Error Analysis 仪表板在多标签分类和目标检测场景下能够正常加载和渲染，不会因为输入数据中包含 NaN 值而出现未捕获的错误，仪表板各组件（如错误树、热力图等）正常显示数据。
